question: Rank the rural sub-districts of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands by their total BCG vaccinations, showing the counts for both BCG and OPV birth doses for those with at least one recorded BCG vaccination.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE), SUM(T2.OPV_0_BIRTH_DOSE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) > 0.00000000000000000000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccinations,
    SUM(fcir.opv_0_birth_dose) AS total_opv_birth_doses
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine fcir ON dg.geography_id = fcir.geography_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND dg.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
HAVING SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) > 0
ORDER BY total_bcg_vaccinations DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccinations,
    SUM(fcir.opv_0_birth_dose) AS total_opv_birth_doses
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine fcir ON dg.geography_id = fcir.geography_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND dg.type_of_area ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
HAVING SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) > 0
ORDER BY total_bcg_vaccinations DESC;
